meaning: n.走过场的比赛(只有一匹马参加的比赛),轻易得胜
examples: Tomorrow's game against Italy should be a walkover.
The match was a walkover for the visiting team.
The final result of the contest will be the playing matches scored plus walkover matches scored.
And the first two matches in Pakistan have banished any thoughts of a walkover.
Scotland secured their place in the final with a walkover victory against a Zimbabwe XI.
